Package cc.quaternion.potshaper

Class PotPageSize.CustomPageSize

java.lang.Object
cc.quaternion.potshaper.PotPageSize.CustomPageSize
Enclosing class:
PotPageSize
public static class PotPageSize.CustomPageSize extends Object
Represents a custom page size with arbitrary dimensions.

This nested class provides the same dimensional access methods as the PotPageSize enum, but for user-defined sizes. Instances are created through the static factory methods in the enclosing class.

Since:
1.0
See Also:
  • PotPageSize.custom(double, double)
  • PotPageSize.customInches(double, double)
  • PotPageSize.customCm(double, double)

    Returns the height of the custom page in points.

    Returns the height of the custom page in English Metric Units (EMUs).
    double

    Returns the width of the custom page in points.
    long
    getWidthEmu()
    Returns the width of the custom page in English Metric Units (EMUs).
    Dimension

    Converts the custom page size to an AWT Dimension object.
